top_signals.title: Jim Cramer sees a big risk to the bull market resurfacing — and it's not the Iran war
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said the growing wave of stock offerings and debt issuance is the next big threat to the bull market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Singapore's Temasek investment fund says crypto is off the table, will focus on AI
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Escalation Continues as U.S. and Iran Face Off Over Hormuz
top_signals.summary: The United States is prepared for a continued exchange of fire with Iran over the Strait of Hormuz and Tehran’s attacks on commercial vessels in the chokepoint, U.S. officials have told Axios, while both sides continued to trade strikes early on Thursday. The U.S. is prepared for an escalation that could last from a day or two to multiple weeks to get Iran to back down from attacking ships in the Strait of Hormuz, a U.S. official told Axios. Iran’s next moves will determine how long and how severe the U.S. response will be, according…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

top_signals.title: Europe's innovation performance strengthens amidst global competition
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 09 Jul 2026 Europe's innovation performance continues to improve, with the EU's overall score rising by 11.6 percentage points since 2019, according to the 2026 European Innovation Scoreboard (EIS), just released by the European Commission.
